2605.29826.title: Towards Localized and Disentangled Knowledge Editing for Multimodal Large Language Models
2605.29826.paper_summary: Existing methods in Multimodal Knowledge Editing (MKE) have advanced the ability to correct outdated or inaccurate knowledge in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). However, they exhibit a critical limitation: while effectively modifying target factual pairs, they fail to generalize edits to logically related queries and often cause unintended alterations to unrelated but visually or semantically linked information. We identify and formalize two underlying failure modes causing this issue: Causal Misalignment, which confines edits to the specific sample, and Feature Entanglement, which causes unintended alterations to coupled but irrelevant information. To address these issues, we propose Localized and Disentangled Knowledge Editing (LDKE), a new framework that achieves precise and generalized editing by localizing fact-specific model layers and disentangling target-relevant inputs from irrelevant ones. Our approach introduces a Fast Localization module to identify and update critical layers efficiently, along with a Disentanglement Classifier that routes inputs appropriately to preserve unrelated knowledge. Extensive experiments across various benchmarks and MLLMs demonstrate that LDKE achieves superior performance in propagating edits to related contexts while maintaining high locality.
2605.29826.paper_summary_zh: 現有的多模態知識編輯（MKE）方法已經提升了修正多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）中過時或不準確知識的能力。<lb/>然而，它們展現出一個關鍵的限制：雖然能有效修改目標事實對，但無法將編輯推廣到邏輯相關的查詢，並且經常導致與無關但在視覺或語義上相關的信息產生意外的變更。<lb/>我們識別並形式化了導致此問題的兩種潛在失效模式：因果不對齊，將編輯限制在特定樣本內，以及特徵纏結，導致對耦合但不相關信息的意外變更。<lb/>為了解決這些問題，我們提出了局部化和解纏知識編輯（LDKE），這是一個新框架，通過將事實特定的模型層本地化並將目標相關的輸入與無關的輸入解纏來實現精確和通用的編輯。<lb/>我們的方法引入了一個快速本地化模塊，以有效識別和更新關鍵層，並配備一個解纏分類器，適當路由輸入以保留無關知識。<lb/>在各種基準和MLLMs上的廣泛實驗表明，LDKE在將編輯推廣到相關上下文的同時，保持高本地性，實現了優越的性能。
2605.29826.author: Leijiang Gu et.al.
2605.29826.authors: Leijiang Gu, Zhen Zeng, Feng Li, Xinjian Gao, Zenglin Shi
